businessQuestion: Which product categories have the highest forecast error percentage?
sqlAnswer:
SELECT
        DP.CATEGORY,
        ROUND(AVG(FF.FORECAST_ERROR_PCT),2) AS AVG_FORECAST_ERROR,
        SUM(FF.FORECAST_ERROR_UNITS) AS ERROR_UNITS,
        SUM(FF.ACTUAL_DEMAND_UNITS) AS ACTUAL_DEMAND
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_FORECAST FF
        JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_PRODUCT DP
        ON FF.PRODUCT_KEY = DP.PRODUCT_KEY
GROUP BY
        DP.CATEGORY
ORDER BY AVG_FORECAST_ERROR DESC;
businessContext: Merchandising teams want to improve inventory planning by focusing on categories with poor demand prediction.
